Home.title: Welcome
Home.subtitle: Trace of The Tide — sample i18n page.
Home.heroBody: We practice knowledge like tending the land: digging, planting, waiting. Culture lives and breathes with us, passed down like stories. Art is an architecture of the senses, built on feeling and instinct. From this rhythm, Trace of the Tide emerges
Home.shareBody: Every story matters. Help us preserve the collective memory by contributing your personal experiences, testimonies, or knowledge of historical events.

hero.title: Stories shaping modern culture.
hero.subtitle: A journal exploring the intersection of art, design, cinema, and the cultural forces that define our era.
hero.imageAlt: Soft folds of translucent silk catching the light

manifesto.philosophyQuote: “We believe culture is not a spectacle to be consumed, but a living conversation that shapes how we see, feel, and become.”
manifesto.visionBody: To become the most trusted voice in contemporary culture — a space where art, thought, and lived experience converge without hierarchy.
manifesto.missionBody: We publish stories that challenge, illuminate, and connect. Every issue is a commitment to depth over speed, beauty over noise, and meaning over metrics.
manifesto.value2: Beauty as a form of truth
manifesto.value4: Slow storytelling in a fast world
manifesto.closingQuote: “Culture is not what we observe from above — it is the ground we stand on.”

spaces.heading: Explore Our Spaces
spaces.subtitle: Spaces for writing, reading, and cultural experience
spaces.writingRoomBody: A living space for writing, workshops, and artistic residency — where ideas evolve into text and notes become a shared language.
spaces.readingSalonBody: A cultural salon where reading becomes a shared experience through curated gatherings and thoughtful discussions.

publications.title: The Quiet Revolution
publications.description: This issue explores the silent movements reshaping contemporary art, architecture, and design — where restraint becomes the ultimate form of expression.
publications.latestSubtitle: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet adipiscing elit.

issues.gallerySubtitle: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet adipiscing elit.

editorialBoard.mastheadBody: Meet the minds shaping our voice, vision, and editorial standards — a team of editors, writers, and translators working across continents and languages.
editorialBoard.newsletterTitle: Interested in contributing to our editorial board?
editorialBoard.newsletterBody: We read every application. Tell us about your work, the languages you carry, and the stories you believe deserve more attention.
editorialBoard.founderQuote: “Culture is not a luxury — it is the very air through which we understand what it means to be alive.”

support.heading: Recent Collaporations
support.subheading: See how authors and contributors have worked together over time
support.collabBody: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet adipiscing elit suscipit aliquam et tellus vel sapien porttitor purus.

supportV2.ctaBody: Help bring independent stories to life—start an issue or support one in progress.
supportV2.startIssueBody: Propose a theme, curate contributors, and lead an issue from concept to publication. Shape the cultural conversation.
supportV2.supportIssueBody: Fund the writing, visuals, and production of issues that matter. Every contribution brings a story closer to the world.
supportV2.step1Body: Choose the support path that resonates with your values and capacity.
supportV2.step2Body: Decide on the frequency and amount that works for you.
supportV2.step3Body: Your contribution flows directly to sustaining creative work.
supportV2.step4Title: Impact and outcomes are shared regularly
supportV2.step4Body: Receive updates on how your support makes a difference.
supportV2.impact1Body: Enabling artists and creators to pursue their vision without compromise.
supportV2.impact2Body: Ensuring those who create receive dignified support for their work.
supportV2.impact3Body: Building institutions and spaces that serve communities for generations.
supportV2.impact4Body: Making cultural resources available to all, regardless of means.
supportV2.openBody: Help bring independent stories to life—start an issue or support one in progress.
supportV2.openIssueBody: Exploring the fluid boundaries of belonging, displacement, and cultural memory across continents.

newsletter.label: Newsletter
newsletter.title: Join our cultural circle
newsletter.body: A biweekly dispatch on art, film, design, and the stories that shape contemporary culture.
newsletter.successBody: Check your inbox for a confirmation link.
newsletter.errorBody: We couldn't subscribe that email. Please try again.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

bookDetail.reviewQuoteFallback: “The greatest adventure is what lies ahead.”

bookDetail.previewLockedBody: You've reached the end of the free preview. Buy this book to keep reading.

writingRoom.heroSubtitle: A space for writing, reflection, and collective thinking
writingRoom.heroBody: Here, writing is not a solitary act — it is shared, explored, and reshaped through workshops, encounters, and lived experiences.
writingRoom.exp1Body: Guided sessions to explore practice and gather around writing.
writingRoom.exp2Body: Long-form creative space. Focused writing time, space, support.
writingRoom.exp3Body: Meet, talk, and think together — moments of shared dialogue.
writingRoom.dictionarySubtitle: A growing archive of words, notes, and reflections.
writingRoom.wantToEngage: Want to engage with these stories?
writingRoom.joinBody: Whether you write daily or are just beginning — there's a place for you here.

submitModal.title: Submit a Note...
submitModal.subtitle: Add your word, thought, or reflection to the living dictionary.
submitModal.successBody: Thanks for contributing. Once an editor approves it, your note will appear in the living dictionary alongside the others.
submitModal.error: Couldn't submit your note. Please try again.

workshops.heroSubtitle: Guided sessions to explore, practice, and grow your writing.
workshops.heroBody: A structured yet open space where writing is practiced through prompts, feedback, and shared exploration.
workshops.cardBody: A focused session on rhythm, structure, and the musicality of prose. Learn how to build sentences that breathe.
workshops.emptyState: No workshops are scheduled right now — check back soon.
workshops.galleryAlt: A glimpse from a recent workshop
workshops.joinBody: Whether you write daily or are just beginning — there's a place for you here.

joinModal.subtitle: Tell us about yourself to reserve your spot.

residency.heroSubtitle: A quiet, immersive space for deep writing.
residency.heroBody: Designed for writers seeking time, focus, and distance from noise — to produce meaningful work.
residency.readyBody: Tell us what you're working on. We'll find the right time and space for you.
residency.galleryAlt: A glimpse from a recent residency

applyModal.title: Apply for Residency...

applyModal.successBody: Thank you for applying. We'll review your submission and reach out within a few days to find the right time and space for you.

openEncounters.heroSubtitle: Meet, talk, and think together — without structure.
openEncounters.heroBody: Informal gatherings where writers and thinkers come together to exchange ideas freely. No agenda. No pressure. Just conversation.
